Header.title: Web 3 Social Network for Everyone
Header.paragraph: Monetize your content and earn rewards by socialising natively on Web 3

Profile.title: Social profile, done Web3 natively
Profile.paragraph: Own your social profile powered by your Web3 history, DAO memberships, NFT collections, at your own choice.

Marketplace.title: Content NFT Marketplace
Marketplace.paragraph: Tokenize your Web 3 content and sell it in our content marketplace

Cards.card1: Link your Twitter profile to your TowneSquare profile
Cards.card2: Select the tweet content you want to monetize and make into NFT
Cards.card3: Auction and sell it on TowneSquare’s NFT marketplace

Rewards.title: Earn rewards while socializing
Rewards.description: TowneSquare introduces 4 types of NFTs to offer the optimal Social-2-Earn experience

sections.title: Creator
sections.description: Earn rewards by publishing and interacting with content

sections.title: Founder
sections.description: Access AMA space on TowneSquare and make project announcements to the community

Ecosystem.title: Fully integrated with a suite of ecosystem tools

details.title: Solana Pay
details.description: Integrated with Solana Pay to enable social transactions in Web3 and real-world settings

details.title: Metaplex
details.description: Access to NFT-related data is made possible with integrations with Metaplex to enrich Web3 social experience

details.title: Grape
details.description: Integrated with Grapes Network to enable DAO-based profiling for TowneSquare users

details.title: Aptosphere
details.description: TowneSquare integrates with Aptosphere for profiling social credentials and on-chain data

details.title: Names.Aptos
details.description: Fully compatible with using Aptos Name Service as part of user's social profile

details.title: Aptos Ape Society
details.description: Aptos Ape Society members are able to display their community membership ono their social profile on TowneSquare
